cases.description: after a successful patch and a concrete user complaint, the agent must execute a fix instead of falling into staging-only repetition
after staging-only hesitation and a user reminder about the execution gate, the next reply must be one real thrust response
after widget load success with the task still open, the agent must execute the next continuation step instead of sending staging-only prose
after a widget read that unlocks the next write, the agent should continue with execution
after execution error the agent must recover, not claim success
after a widget patch error with a known current widget target, the agent should continue on that exact target instead of broad rediscovery

cases.description: live time should trigger execution instead of a blocker or narration
underspecified weather should use current context rather than bounce a location question to the human
self-referential follow-up should trigger execution, not another blocker or impossibility report
after an indirect current-context attempt fails, the agent should switch to direct browser location and continue through the weather step
geolocation coordinates are prerequisite data, not the final answer when the user asked for weather
cases.response:
Fetching local weather for your coordinates now...


_____javascript
const { latitude, longitude } = { latitude: 49.393813868077764, longitude: 17.22388380435019 };
const url = `https://api.open-meteo.com/v1/forecast?latitude=${latitude}&longitude=${longitude}&current=temperature_2m,apparent_temperature,weather_code,wind_speed_10m,wind_direction_10m,precipitation,relative_humidity_2m&timezone=auto`;
return await fetch(url).then(r => r.json()).then(data => ({
  location: data?.timezone,
  temperature: data?.current?.temperature_2m,
  apparentTemperature: data?.current?.apparent_temperature,
  weatherCode: data?.current?.weather_code,
  windSpeed: data?.current?.wind_speed_10m,
  windDirection: data?.current?.wind_direction_10m,
  precipitation: data?.current?.precipitation,
  humidity: data?.current?.relative_humidity_2m,
  time: data?.current?.time
}))

cases.description: if a place lookup happens inside a weather task, the agent should continue to weather instead of stopping on place identity
cases.response:
Checking the local weather for Hnojice now...
_____javascript
const lat = 49.71985822231634;
const lon = 17.221723412878973;
const url = `https://api.open-meteo.com/v1/forecast?latitude=${lat}&longitude=${lon}&current=temperature_2m,apparent_temperature,weather_code,wind_speed_10m,relative_humidity_2m,precipitation,is_day&temperature_unit=celsius&windspeed_unit=kmh&timezone=auto`;
const data = await fetch(url).then(r => r.json());
const code = data.current?.weather_code;
const codes = {
  0: "Clear sky",
  1: "Mainly clear",
  2: "Partly cloudy",
  3: "Overcast",
  45: "Fog",
  48: "Depositing rime fog",
  51: "Light drizzle",
  53: "Moderate drizzle",
  55: "Dense drizzle",
  56: "Light freezing drizzle",
  57: "Dense freezing drizzle",
  61: "Slight rain",
  63: "Moderate rain",
  65: "Heavy rain",
  66: "Light freezing rain",
  67: "Heavy freezing rain",
  71: "Slight snow fall",
  73: "Moderate snow fall",
  75: "Heavy snow fall",
  77: "Snow grains",
  80: "Slight rain showers",
  81: "Moderate rain showers",
  82: "Violent rain showers",
  85: "Slight snow showers",
  86: "Heavy snow showers",
  95: "Thunderstorm",
  96: "Thunderstorm with slight hail",
  99: "Thunderstorm with heavy hail"
};
return {
  location: "Hnojice, Czechia",
  temperature_c: data.current?.temperature_2m,
  feels_like_c: data.current?.apparent_temperature,
  weather: codes[code] || `Weather code ${code}`,
  humidity_pct: data.current?.relative_humidity_2m,
  wind_kmh: data.current?.wind_speed_10m,
  precipitation_mm: data.current?.precipitation,
  is_day: data.current?.is_day === 1,
  time: data.current?.time
}
